arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arne Slot will get his first taste of the Merseyside Derby this weekend when Liverpool take on Everton. It’s a clash of huge significance for both teams and will be the last-ever Merseyside Derby staged at Goodison Park. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool veteran makes decision on Reds’ contract offer amid transfer interest
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Virgil van Dijk has been linked with a move away from the club with his contract expiring at the end of the season. The 33-year-old central defender will be a free agent in the summer of 2025, and the Reds have now offered him a new contract. arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: The last ever Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park is due to kick-off at lunchtime as Everton host Liverpool. However, a postponement may be in order. Storm Darragh, with winds up to 70 mph expected, is threatening to wreak havoc on the football schedule.
